title: [codereview-P1] Simulation loop does not yet integrate SFN based channel selection for tx/rx rendezvous
description: The _handle_tx_start and barrier sync in Simulation must use node.hop_schedule or compute synchronized_hop_channel using current SFN/time before calling start_tx with channel. Add SFN tracking to Simulation. Matches ccp16.json vectors. Fix test integrity by using independent oracle. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-9h7p
close_reason: Fixed in synchronized hopping updates to SimNode/Simulation; channel propagation, immutability with tuple, docstring/tests addressed in passes
